Terms of Service

Last Updated: February 12, 2024

Welcome to Shayari wale. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read these terms carefully before using our services.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Shayari wale, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

2. Description of Service

Shayari wale is an online platform that allows users to:

  • Read and share shayari (poetry) in multiple languages
  • Submit original shayari content
  • Like, share, and download shayari
  • Participate in our voucher reward program
  • Connect with other poetry enthusiasts

3. User Accounts

3.1 Registration

To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You agree to:

  • Provide accurate and complete information
  • Maintain the security of your account credentials
  • Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
  • Accept responsibility for all activities under your account

3.2 Account Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or engage in prohibited activities.

4. Content Submission

4.1 User-Generated Content

By submitting content to Shayari wale, you:

  • Grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content
  • Confirm that you own or have rights to the content you submit
  • Agree that your content does not violate any third-party rights
  • Understand that published content may be viewed by the public

4.2 Content Standards

All submitted content must:

  • Be original or properly attributed
  • Not contain hate speech, discrimination, or harassment
  • Not include explicit or adult content
  • Not promote violence or illegal activities
  • Not infringe on intellectual property rights
  • Not contain spam or misleading information

4.3 Content Moderation

We reserve the right to review, edit, or remove any content that violates these terms or our content guidelines. We may also suspend users who repeatedly violate our policies.

5. Voucher Reward Program

5.1 Eligibility

To be eligible for the Amazon voucher reward:

  • Your submitted shayari must receive 500 or more genuine likes
  • The shayari must be original content
  • You must have a valid Amazon India account
  • You must complete the redemption request form accurately

5.2 Reward Terms

  • Each eligible shayari qualifies for one ₹500 Amazon voucher
  • Vouchers are sent within 3-5 business days after verification
  • We reserve the right to verify the authenticity of likes
  • Fraudulent activity will result in disqualification
  • Rewards are subject to availability and may change without notice

5.3 Verification Process

We will verify:

  • The authenticity of likes (no bot activity)
  • Originality of the submitted content
  • Compliance with our content guidelines
  • Accuracy of your Amazon account information

6. Intellectual Property

6.1 Our Intellectual Property

The Shayari wale name, logo, website design, and all related content are our property and protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

6.2 Your Intellectual Property

You retain ownership of the content you submit. By submitting content, you grant us the license described in Section 4.1.

7. Prohibited Activities

You agree not to:

  • Use automated systems to generate likes or engagement
  • Impersonate other users or entities
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
  • Interfere with the proper functioning of the website
  • Collect user information without consent
  • Use the platform for commercial solicitation without permission
  • Upload malicious code or viruses

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

Our services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee:

  • Uninterrupted or error-free service
  • That defects will be corrected
  • That the website is free of viruses or harmful components
  • The accuracy or reliability of any content

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Shayari wale shall not be liable for:

  • Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
  • Loss of profits, data, or goodwill
  • Damages arising from service interruption
  • Damages exceeding the amount you paid to use our services

10. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Shayari wale and its affiliates from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of our services or violation of these terms.

11. Governing Law

These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in [Your City], India.

12. Changes to Terms

We may modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes by posting a notice on our website. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

13. Severability

If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

14. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

  • Email: shayariwale.in@gmail.com
  • Website: shayariwale.in
